title: Add Author Section to README
description: Update the project's README file to include an author section with relevant information.
details: Open the README.md file in the project root. Add a clearly labeled 'Author' section near the end (or in a logical position if a convention exists). Include the author's name and, if appropriate, contact information or a link to their profile (e.g., GitHub, email). Ensure formatting matches the rest of the README and adheres to Markdown best practices.
test_strategy: Review the updated README in a Markdown viewer to confirm the author section is present, correctly formatted, and contains accurate information. Optionally, ask a peer to verify clarity and placement.
